name: S&P 500 Passive ETF
desc: Passive funds tracking index baskets (like S&P 500 or Nifty 50), trading directly on exchanges like normal stocks.

name: GrowMax Active Equity Mutual Fund
desc: Pooled investment portfolios managed by professional fund managers, trading once daily at Net Asset Value (NAV).

name: Apex Prime Commercial REIT
desc: Trust companies owning rent-generating real estate, distributing 90% of taxable income to shareholders as dividends.
